patent_context.patent_title: Waterproof LED strip light with adhesive backing
patent_context.claim_description: A waterproof LED strip light comprising a flexible PCB with surface-mounted LEDs, a silicone encapsulation layer, and a pressure-sensitive adhesive backing

claims.claim_text: A waterproof LED strip light comprising a flexible PCB with surface-mounted LEDs, a silicone encapsulation layer, and a pressure-sensitive adhesive backing
claims.accused_product_description: The LumiStrip Pro uses a flexible printed circuit board with SMD LEDs, a silicone waterproof coating, and 3M adhesive tape on the back for mounting.

element_mapping_facts.elem_1: Flexible PCB with SMD LEDs present — matched
element_mapping_facts.elem_3: 3M adhesive tape on back — satisfies pressure-sensitive adhesive backing
